response.overview: Private investigators Jeff and Zainal are down on their luck after a plague severely devastates their business. They are forced to take on various jobs, including transporting the corpse of a 100-year-old man, to make ends meet. Then, they are hired to find the ghost of a girl named Alice, who is allegedly beginning to haunt the area of her former college a year after her disappearance.
response.title: Gui di Astro First
